name: aws-sentinel-packv3
description: Production-grade Cribl Pack that ingests 9 AWS log types (CloudTrail, VPC Flow, GuardDuty, WAF, Route53, ALB, NLB, S3 Access, Security Hub) via S3/SQS, transforms them to match native Sentinel table schemas, and delivers via Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API with DCRs.
author: David Maxwell via Claude
